name: Creamy Cannelloni with Chicken and Almonds
recipeIngredient: 1 package frozen spinach, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauce: Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat. Sauté onion until tender, about 5 minutes.
2. Stir in flour and cook for 1 minute. Add stock, cream, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 8-10 minutes or until thickened.
3. Remove from heat and stir in Swiss cheese. Cover with waxed paper and set aside.
4. Filling: Combine chicken, spinach, ricotta, almonds, Parmesan, egg, and nutmeg in a bowl. Blend all ingredients together.
5. Assembly: Place filling spoonfuls into the pre-cooked cannelloni shells. Pour a thin layer of sauce over the bottom of a baking dish.
6. Arrange the stuffed cannelloni in a single layer over the sauce. Sprinkle with chopped tomatoes and pour remaining sauce over the cannelloni.
7. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Cover with aluminum foil.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 60-70 minutes or until pasta is soft and the top bubbles. If making ahead, refrigerate and bake for a shorter time.
